Tools.title: Tools
Tools.description: Small utilities I built for everyday use.
Tools.metaDescription: Free web tools: QR generator and more coming soon.

fb.title: FB Info Lookup
fb.shortDescription: Paste a Facebook profile/page link to quickly extract username, numeric ID, and public metadata.
fb.metaDescription: Extract username, global ID (numeric), and public info from a Facebook profile or fanpage link.
fb.shortcutHint: Tip: press Enter to look up.
fb.limitationsBody: Facebook restricts automated access. This tool will always return username and numeric ID when present in the URL; name/photo/description are best-effort — Facebook sometimes serves a login wall instead. Private info (city, work, education...) requires user OAuth and cannot be fetched here.
fb.noResultYet: No result yet. Paste a link and hit Lookup.
fb.pageIdHintNoToken: Set FB_GRAPH_TOKEN in .env to fetch the Page Entity ID. Only Actor ID (page-as-user) is currently extracted from public HTML.
fb.errorInvalidUrl: Invalid URL. Must be a Facebook link.
fb.errorParseFailed: Could not recognize this Facebook URL pattern.
fb.errorFbBlocked: Facebook blocked the request. Only URL-derived info is available.
fb.errorRateLimited: Too many lookups. Please retry in {seconds}s.
fb.errorUnknown: Failed to fetch info. Try again later.

shopee.title: Shopee link with nF
shopee.shortDescription: Paste a Shopee product link to generate an affiliate link via Shopee's official template.
shopee.metaDescription: Create a Shopee affiliate link from a raw product URL using the official public an_redir template — no auth required.
shopee.thanks: Thanks for using this tool — if you purchase through this link, I'll get a small commission to keep the blog running 🙏
shopee.subIdToggle: Optional: add sub_id for campaign tracking
shopee.subIdHint: Up to 5 values separated by '-'. Leave empty if you don't need tracking.
shopee.errorNotShopee: URL must be a shopee.vn / shp.ee link.
shopee.errorNotConfigured: Admin hasn't set SHOPEE_AFFILIATE_ID in the server's .env.
shopee.errorRateLimited: Too many submissions. Please retry in {seconds}s.

qr.title: QR Generator
qr.shortDescription: Generate QR codes from URLs or text, download as PNG/JPEG or copy to clipboard.
qr.metaDescription: Quickly generate QR codes from a URL or text, customize size and error correction, download as PNG/JPEG or copy.
qr.contentPlaceholder: Paste a link or any text to encode...
qr.errorGenerate: Failed to generate QR. Try again?
qr.copyFail: Copy failed. Your browser may not support it.
